diff: This document contains a Directory of all prospective Instances of the Token SkyLink Primitive whose Invocation is currently in progress. Invocations that are completed successfully are moved to [Active Instances Directory](5697d516-fc74-40a8-a2c7-7f00c534f3a6), whereas failed Invocations are Archived in [Hub Data Repository](dff4750a-bf17-475d-8741-049e00083d5f).
description: Do not merge until associated poll passes
